chipsynth SFC.name: Modulation Wheel
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the modulation amount, typically modulated by a MIDI mod wheel (MIDI CC 1, Range: 0 to 1).

chipsynth SFC.name: Pitch Bend
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the pitch bend amount, typically modulated by a MIDI pitch bend wheel (-1 to 1).

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Global Detune
chipsynth SFC.description: Applies a global detune during VGM playback (-6000 to +6000 cents).

chipsynth SFC.name: Output Filtering Mode
chipsynth SFC.description: Selects the audio output filtering quality (Minimal, Native).

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Play
chipsynth SFC.description: Starts or resumes playback of the file.

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Stop
chipsynth SFC.description: Stops playback of the file.

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Speed Multiplier
chipsynth SFC.description: Adjusts the playback speed multiplier for VGM files (0.01x to 64x).

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Prev Track
chipsynth SFC.description: Goes to the previous track in a multi-track file (e.g., RSN).

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Next Track
chipsynth SFC.description: Goes to the next track in a multi-track file (e.g., RSN).

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Rewind
chipsynth SFC.description: Rewinds the currently playing file.

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Display Mode
chipsynth SFC.description: Selects the information displayed in the visualizer area (Song Info, Registers, ARAM View).

chipsynth SFC.name: VGM Player Loop Toggle
chipsynth SFC.description: Toggles looping playback for the current file.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Enable
chipsynth SFC.description: Enables or disables Channel 1.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Retrigger
chipsynth SFC.description: Enables note retriggering for Channel 1 (applies in mono mode).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Low Key
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Channel 1's key range (0-127).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 High Key
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Channel 1's key range (0-127).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Note Delay
chipsynth SFC.description: Applies a delay to note playback on Channel 1 (0-99 units).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Coarse Tune
chipsynth SFC.description: Adjusts the coarse tuning of Channel 1 (-128 to +128, likely semitones).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Fine Tune
chipsynth SFC.description: Adjusts the fine tuning of Channel 1 (-100 to +100 cents).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Volume
chipsynth SFC.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of Channel 1 (0.0 to 1.0).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Fixed Pitch
chipsynth SFC.description: Enables fixed pitch playback for Channel 1 (ignores note input pitch).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Glide
chipsynth SFC.description: Adjusts the portamento/glide time for Channel 1 (0-100).

chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the level of the 12kHz band FIR filter coefficient for the Echo/Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Filter 16k
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the level of the 16kHz band FIR filter coefficient for the Echo/Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Filter 0k Phase Invert
chipsynth SFC.description: Inverts the phase for the 0kHz band FIR filter coefficient.

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Filter 4k Phase Amount
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the phase modification amount for the 4kHz band FIR filter coefficient (0.0-1.0).

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Filter 8k Phase Amount
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the phase modification amount for the 8kHz band FIR filter coefficient (0.0-1.0).

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Filter 12k Phase Amount
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the phase modification amount for the 12kHz band FIR filter coefficient (0.0-1.0).

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Filter 16k Phase Invert
chipsynth SFC.description: Inverts the phase for the 16kHz band FIR filter coefficient.

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Dry Pan
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the panning of the dry signal in the Echo/Delay output mix (Left-Right).

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Wet Pan
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the panning of the wet (delayed) signal in the Echo/Delay output mix (Left-Right).

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Dry Phase Invert
chipsynth SFC.description: Inverts the phase of the dry signal path in the echo effect.

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Wet Phase Invert
chipsynth SFC.description: Inverts the phase of the wet (delayed) signal path in the echo effect.

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Feedback Phase Invert
chipsynth SFC.description: Inverts the phase of the feedback signal path in the echo effect.

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Left Dry Phase Invert
chipsynth SFC.description: Inverts the phase of the left dry signal path.

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Left Wet Phase Invert
chipsynth SFC.description: Inverts the phase of the left wet signal path.

chipsynth SFC.name: Echo Explode
chipsynth SFC.description: Enables an unstable feedback mode (potentially very loud).

chipsynth SFC.name: Prevent Pitch Wraps
chipsynth SFC.description: Prevents pitch values from wrapping around when extreme modulation is applied.

chipsynth SFC.name: Sample Auto-Assign Target
chipsynth SFC.description: Selects the channel(s) to automatically assign newly loaded/dropped samples to (None, All Active, Ch 1-8).

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 1 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 1.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 2 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 2.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 3 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 3.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 4 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 4.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 5 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 5.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 6 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 6.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 7 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 7.

chipsynth SFC.name: Ch 8 Activity Indicator
chipsynth SFC.description: Visual indicator showing activity on Channel 8.

chipsynth SFC.name: Interp
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the sample interpolation method (Nearest, Linear, Cubic, Native).

chipsynth SFC.description: Mutes Channel 1 during VGM playback.

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Enable
chipsynth SFC.description: Enables or disables Step Sequencer 1.

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Target Parameter
chipsynth SFC.description: Selects the destination parameter modulated by Step Sequencer 1.

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Loop Mode
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the loop mode for Step Sequencer 1 (One Shot, Note Gate, Loop Always).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Sync Mode
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the timing source for Step Sequencer 1 (Host BPM, Internal BPM, Note Period).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Steps
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the number of steps for Step Sequencer 1 (4-128).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Speed Scale
chipsynth SFC.description: Scales the playback speed of Step Sequencer 1 (0.25x to 8x).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Time Numerator
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the time signature numerator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-32).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Time Denominator
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the time signature denominator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-256).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Loop Start
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the loop start point for Step Sequencer 1 (Internal parameter).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Loop End
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets the loop end point for Step Sequencer 1 (Internal parameter).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Start Delay
chipsynth SFC.description: Delays the start of Step Sequencer 1's playback (0-255 units).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Reset Mode
chipsynth SFC.description: Sets when Step Sequencer 1's position resets (Each Note, First Note, Last Note, Bar Pos, Never).

chipsynth SFC.name: Step 1 Value Ramp
chipsynth SFC.description: Controls the ramp/interpolation time between steps in Step Sequencer 1 (0-1023 units).

chipsynth MD.description: Selects the DAC playback timing jitter mode (No Jitter, VSYNC, Random).

chipsynth MD.description: Controls the amount of DAC playback timing jitter (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: DAC Resolution
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the DAC output bit resolution (1-8 bits).

chipsynth MD.name: DAC Gain
chipsynth MD.description: Adjusts the gain applied to the DAC sample (0x to 4x).

chipsynth MD.name: DAC Slicer Playback Mode
chipsynth MD.description: Sets how slices/regions of the DAC sample are played back (Region, Continue, Loop).

chipsynth MD.name: DAC Slicer MIDI Offset
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the base MIDI note for triggering DAC sample slices (C-2 to C2).

chipsynth MD.name: Console Filter
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the emulated console audio output filter model (various MD1/MD2/Nomad revisions).

chipsynth MD.name: Console DAC/Mix
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the emulated console DAC and audio mixing model (various MD1/MD2/Nomad revisions, or Perfect).

chipsynth MD.name: Step 1 Sync Mode
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the timing source for Step Sequencer 1 (Host BPM, Internal BPM, Note Period).

chipsynth MD.description: Sets the number of steps for Step Sequencer 1 (4-64).

chipsynth MD.description: Scales the playback speed of Step Sequencer 1 (0.25x to 8x).

chipsynth MD.description: Sets the time signature numerator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-32).

chipsynth MD.name: Step 1 Time Denominator
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the time signature denominator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-256).

chipsynth MD.name: Step 1 Value Ramp
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the ramp/interpolation time between steps in Step Sequencer 1 (0-1023 units).

chipsynth MD.name: Volume
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the main output volume (Range: 0.0 to 2.0, Default: 0.5).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Mode
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the arpeggiator playback mode (Up, Down, Up-Down, Key, Random).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Type
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the arpeggiator sequence type (Loop, Single, Sustain Last).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Rate
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the arpeggiator speed/note division relative to tempo (1/1 to 1/384).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Gate Length
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the length of notes generated by the arpeggiator (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp BPM
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the internal tempo for the arpeggiator when not synced to host (10-500 BPM).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Range
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the octave range for the arpeggiator (1 oct, 2 oct, 3 oct).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Velocity Mode
chipsynth MD.description: Determines how velocity is applied to arpeggiated notes (Key, 1st, Norm).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Sequence Based
chipsynth MD.description: Toggles proportional division for arpeggiator timing.

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Sync To Host
chipsynth MD.description: Toggles syncing the arpeggiator tempo to the host DAW.

chipsynth MD.name: Arp One Note Repeat
chipsynth MD.description: Toggles whether the arpeggiator repeats a single held note.

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Swing
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the swing amount for the arpeggiator timing (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Arp Enable
chipsynth MD.description: Enables or disables the Arpeggiator effect.

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus Min Delay
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the minimum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus Max Delay
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the maximum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus Amount
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus Alt Amount
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the alternate modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus Rate
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the LFO rate for the Chorus modulation (0.025Hz to 6Hz).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus LFO Waveform
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the LFO waveform for the Chorus modulation (Sine, Triangle).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus LFO Phase Offset
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the LFO phase offset between channels for the Chorus effect (0-360 degrees).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus Feedback
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Decay
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the decay time of the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Damp Lo Freq
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the frequency for the low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-1000Hz).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Damp Lo Amount
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the amount of low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Damp Hi Freq
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the frequency for the high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (500Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Damp Hi Amount
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the amount of high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Size
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the perceived size of the simulated space in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Width
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the stereo width of the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Predelay
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the predelay time before the reverb onset in the Ambience Reverb (0-500ms).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb EQ Lo Freq
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the frequency for the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-6kHz).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb EQ Lo Gain
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the gain of the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb EQ Hi Freq
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the frequency for the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (250Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb EQ Hi Gain
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the gain of the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Diffusion
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the diffusion amount in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Enable
chipsynth MD.description: Enables or disables the Ambience Reverb effect.

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Time
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the main delay time (sync factor) for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Beat Delay
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the synced delay time division for the Stereo Delay (0 to 2 bars).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Mod Rate
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the modulation rate for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Mod Level
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the modulation depth/level for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 1 Volume
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the volume of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 2 Volume
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the volume of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 3 Volume
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the volume of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 4 Volume
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the volume of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 1 Pan
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the panning of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 2 Pan
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the panning of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 3 Pan
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the panning of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap 4 Pan
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the panning of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Feedback
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Tap Crossmix
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the crossmix between delay taps in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Diffusion Mix
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the diffusion mix amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Diffusion Length
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the diffusion length in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Diffusion Feedback
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the diffusion feedback amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Chorus Enable
chipsynth MD.description: Enables or disables the Chorus effect.

chipsynth MD.name: DAC Sensitivity
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the sensitivity/trigger threshold for DAC sample playback (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Reverb Send
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Delay Send
chipsynth MD.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Stereo Delay effect (0-100%).

chipsynth MD.name: Internal Custom Data
chipsynth MD.description: Internal storage for complex settings like DAC sample data, modulation matrix, or step sequences.

chipsynth MD.name: Effect Preset (Slot 0: Reverb)
chipsynth MD.description: Manages presets for the effect in slot 0 (Ambience Reverb).

chipsynth MD.name: Effect Preset (Slot 1: Delay)
chipsynth MD.description: Manages presets for the effect in slot 1 (Stereo Delay).

chipsynth MD.name: Effect Enable (Slot 0: Reverb)
chipsynth MD.description: Enables/disables the effect in slot 0 (Ambience Reverb).

chipsynth MD.name: Effect Enable (Slot 1: Delay)
chipsynth MD.description: Enables/disables the effect in slot 1 (Stereo Delay).

chipsynth MD.name: On-Screen Keyboard
chipsynth MD.description: Internal parameter related to the on-screen keyboard display and interaction.

chipsynth MD.name: MTS-ESP Active
chipsynth MD.description: Enables or disables MIDI Tuning Standard (MTS-ESP) support.

chipsynth MD.name: Preset (Main)
chipsynth MD.description: Manages preset loading and saving for the main instrument.

chipsynth MD.name: Preset (Patch A)
chipsynth MD.description: Manages presets for FM Patch A.

chipsynth MD.name: Preset (Patch B)
chipsynth MD.description: Manages presets for FM Patch B.

chipsynth MD.name: Preset (Arpeggiator)
chipsynth MD.description: Manages presets for the Arpeggiator effect.

chipsynth MD.name: Preset (Chorus)
chipsynth MD.description: Manages presets for the Chorus effect.

chipsynth MD.name: UI Skin Variant
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the visual theme/skin for the plugin interface (JP, EUR, US, USER).

chipsynth MD.name: Scala Center Note
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the center note/reference pitch for the loaded Scala tuning file.

chipsynth MD.name: MIDI Input Channel
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the MIDI channel for input (OMNI, 1-16).

chipsynth MD.name: Internal Slot Command
chipsynth MD.description: Internal parameter used to trigger commands or actions within the plugin.

chipsynth MD.name: Fixed Pitch Root Note
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the root note used when Fixed Pitch is enabled for a channel (C2, C3, C4).

chipsynth MD.name: MIDI Mode
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the MIDI operational mode (Normal, Multi, MPE).

chipsynth MD.name: Mono Retrigger
chipsynth MD.description: Enables note retriggering in mono mode.

chipsynth MD.name: Mono Always Use New Velocity
chipsynth MD.description: Determines if new note velocity is always applied in mono mode, even for legato notes.

chipsynth MD.name: Pitch Bend Range
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the pitch bend range in semitones (Def, OFF, 1-48).

chipsynth MD.name: Poly
chipsynth MD.description: Sets the maximum number of simultaneous voices (polyphony, 1-6).

chipsynth MD.name: MPE Zones
chipsynth MD.description: Configures MPE zone assignments (FM=0/PSG=1, FM=1/PSG=0, FM+PSG=0, FM+PSG=1).

chipsynth MD.name: FM Octave Break
chipsynth MD.description: Selects the note where the octave break occurs for FM frequency calculation (F#/G or B/C for OPN2, B/C for OPNA).

chipsynth MD.name: Global Tuning
chipsynth MD.description: Adjusts the global tuning offset in cents (-300 to +300).

chipsynth MD.name: Velocity Sensitivity
chipsynth MD.description: Adjusts how note velocity affects amplitude (0.0 to 1.0).

chipsynth MD.name: Randomize Patch A
chipsynth MD.description: Internal command parameter to randomize FM Patch A.

chipsynth MD.name: Randomize Patch B
chipsynth MD.description: Internal command parameter to randomize FM Patch B.

chipsynth MD.name: Randomize Patch K
chipsynth MD.description: Internal command parameter to randomize FM Patch K (C+).

chipsynth MD.name: Randomize Patch L
chipsynth MD.description: Internal command parameter to randomize FM Patch L (C+).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Modulation Wheel
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the modulation amount, typically modulated by a MIDI mod wheel (MIDI CC 1, Range: 0 to 1).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD Trigger Note
chipsynth PortaFM.description: MIDI Note Number to trigger the Bass Drum sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD Trigger Note
chipsynth PortaFM.description: MIDI Note Number to trigger the Snare Drum sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM Trigger Note
chipsynth PortaFM.description: MIDI Note Number to trigger the Tom sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TCY Trigger Note
chipsynth PortaFM.description: MIDI Note Number to trigger the Top Cymbal sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: HH Trigger Note
chipsynth PortaFM.description: MIDI Note Number to trigger the Hi-Hat sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Randomize Patch
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Internal command parameter to randomize the current custom patch.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Pitch Bend
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the pitch bend amount, typically modulated by a MIDI pitch bend wheel (-1 to 1).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Clock Config
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the master clock frequency emulation for VGM playback (3.00MHz, 3.50MHz, 3.58MHz, 4.00MHz).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Play
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Starts or resumes playback of the file.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Stop
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Stops playback of the file.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Speed Multiplier
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the playback speed multiplier for VGM files (0.1x to 2x).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Prev Track
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Goes to the previous track in a multi-track file.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Next Track
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Goes to the next track in a multi-track file.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Rewind
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Rewinds the currently playing file.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Display Mode
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the information displayed in the visualizer area (Song Info, Registers).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: VGM Player Loop Toggle
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Toggles looping playback for the current file.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables Layer 1.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Low Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Layer 1's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 High Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Layer 1's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Note Delay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Applies a delay to note playback on Layer 1 (0-100 units).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Coarse Tune
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the coarse tuning of Layer 1 (-120 to +120 semitones).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Fine Tune
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the fine tuning of Layer 1 (-100 to +100 cents).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Fixed Pitch
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables fixed pitch playback for Layer 1 (ignores note input pitch).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Glide
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the portamento/glide time for Layer 1 (0-100).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables Layer 2.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Low Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Layer 2's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 High Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Layer 2's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Note Delay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Applies a delay to note playback on Layer 2 (0-100 units).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Coarse Tune
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the coarse tuning of Layer 2 (-120 to +120 semitones).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Fine Tune
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the fine tuning of Layer 2 (-100 to +100 cents).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Fixed Pitch
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables fixed pitch playback for Layer 2 (ignores note input pitch).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Glide
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the portamento/glide time for Layer 2 (0-100).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Bass Drum sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD Low Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for the Bass Drum sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD High Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for the Bass Drum sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD Pitch
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the pitch of the Bass Drum sound (-120 to +120 semitones).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD Velocity Sens
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the velocity sensitivity of the Bass Drum sound (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Snare Drum sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD Low Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for the Snare Drum sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD High Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for the Snare Drum sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD Pitch
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the pitch of the Snare Drum sound (-120 to +120 semitones).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD Velocity Sens
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the velocity sensitivity of the Snare Drum sound (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Tom sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM Low Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for the Tom sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM High Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for the Tom sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM Pitch
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the pitch of the Tom sound (-120 to +120 semitones).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM Velocity Sens
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the velocity sensitivity of the Tom sound (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TCY Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Top Cymbal sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TCY Low Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for the Top Cymbal sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TCY High Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for the Top Cymbal sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TCY Velocity Sens
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the velocity sensitivity of the Top Cymbal sound (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: HH Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Hi-Hat sound.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: HH Low Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for the Hi-Hat sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: HH High Key
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for the Hi-Hat sound's key range (0-127).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: HH Velocity Sens
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the velocity sensitivity of the Hi-Hat sound (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Tremolo Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables LFO Tremolo (Amplitude Modulation) for the Modulator.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Vibrato Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables LFO Vibrato (Pitch Modulation) for the Modulator.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod EG Type
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the Envelope Generator type for the Modulator (ADSR or Percussive).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod KS Rate Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables Key Scale Rate sensitivity for the Modulator.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Mult
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Frequency Multiplier for the Modulator (0.5x to 15x).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod KS Level
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Key Scale Level sensitivity for the Modulator (0-3).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Level
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Total Level (amplitude) for the Modulator (0-63).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Waveform
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the waveform for the Modulator (SINE, HALF, DUAL, QURT - depends on variant).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Attack
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Attack Rate (AR) for the Modulator (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Decay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Decay Rate (DR) for the Modulator (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Sustain
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Sustain Level (SL) for the Modulator (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Release
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Release Rate (RR) for the Modulator (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car Tremolo Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables LFO Tremolo (Amplitude Modulation) for the Carrier.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car Vibrato Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables LFO Vibrato (Pitch Modulation) for the Carrier.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car EG Type / OPL2 Car TL
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the Envelope Generator type for the Carrier (ADSR or Percussive). In OPL2 additive mode, this controls Carrier Total Level (0-63).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car Waveform
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the waveform for the Carrier (SINE, HALF, DUAL, QURT - depends on variant).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car Mult
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Frequency Multiplier for the Carrier (0.5x to 15x).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car KS Level
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Key Scale Level sensitivity for the Carrier (0-3).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car KS Rate Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables Key Scale Rate sensitivity for the Carrier.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car Level
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Total Level (amplitude) for the Carrier (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mod Feedback
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Feedback level for the Modulator (0-7).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car Attack
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Attack Rate (AR) for the Carrier (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Additive Mode / Car Decay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables Additive Synthesis mode (OPL2 only). Otherwise, controls the Decay Rate (DR) for the Carrier (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Car Sustain
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the Sustain Level (SL) for the Carrier (0-15).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Step 1 Speed Scale
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Scales the playback speed of Step Sequencer 1 (0.25x to 8x).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Step 1 Time Numerator

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Step 1 Time Denominator

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Step 1 Reset Mode
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets when Step Sequencer 1's position resets (Each Note, First Note, Last Note, Bar Pos, Never).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Step 1 Value Ramp
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the ramp/interpolation time between steps in Step Sequencer 1 (0-1024 units).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of Layer 1 (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of Layer 2 (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of the Bass Drum sound (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of the Snare Drum sound (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of the Tom sound (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TCY Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of the Top Cymbal sound (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: HH Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the volume/amplitude of the Hi-Hat sound (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer1 Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo panning for Layer 1 (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Layer2 Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo panning for Layer 2 (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: BD Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo panning for the Bass Drum sound (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: SD Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo panning for the Snare Drum sound (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TOM Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo panning for the Tom sound (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Global Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the main output volume (Range: 0.0 to 4.0, Default: 1.0).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: TCY Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo panning for the Top Cymbal sound (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: HH Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo panning for the Hi-Hat sound (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Mode
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the arpeggiator playback mode (Up, Down, Up-Down, Key, Random).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Type
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the arpeggiator sequence type (Loop, Single, Sustain Last).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Rate
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the arpeggiator speed/note division relative to tempo (1/1 to 1/384).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Gate Length
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the length of notes generated by the arpeggiator (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp BPM
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the internal tempo for the arpeggiator when not synced to host (10-500 BPM).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Range
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the octave range for the arpeggiator (1 oct, 2 oct, 3 oct).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Velocity Mode
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Determines how velocity is applied to arpeggiated notes (Key, 1st, Norm).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Sequence Based
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Toggles proportional division for arpeggiator timing.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Sync To Host
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Toggles syncing the arpeggiator tempo to the host DAW.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp One Note Repeat
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Toggles whether the arpeggiator repeats a single held note.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Swing
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the swing amount for the arpeggiator timing (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Arp Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Arpeggiator effect.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus Min Delay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the minimum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus Max Delay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the maximum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus Amount
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus Alt Amount
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the alternate modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus Rate
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the LFO rate for the Chorus modulation (0.025Hz to 6Hz).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus LFO Waveform
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the LFO waveform for the Chorus modulation (Sine, Triangle).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus LFO Phase Offset
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the LFO phase offset between channels for the Chorus effect (0-360 degrees).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus Feedback
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Decay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the decay time of the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Damp Lo Freq
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the frequency for the low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-1000Hz).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Damp Lo Amount
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the amount of low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Damp Hi Freq
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the frequency for the high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (500Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Damp Hi Amount
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the amount of high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Size
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the perceived size of the simulated space in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Width
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the stereo width of the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Predelay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the predelay time before the reverb onset in the Ambience Reverb (0-500ms).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb EQ Lo Freq
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the frequency for the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-6kHz).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb EQ Lo Gain
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the gain of the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb EQ Hi Freq
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the frequency for the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (250Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb EQ Hi Gain
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the gain of the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Diffusion
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the diffusion amount in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Ambience Reverb effect.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Time
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the main delay time (sync factor) for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Beat Delay
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the synced delay time division for the Stereo Delay (0 to 2 bars).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Mod Rate
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the modulation rate for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Mod Level
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the modulation depth/level for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 1 Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the volume of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 2 Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the volume of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 3 Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the volume of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 4 Volume
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the volume of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 1 Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the panning of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 2 Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the panning of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 3 Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the panning of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap 4 Pan
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the panning of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Feedback
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Tap Crossmix
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the crossmix between delay taps in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Diffusion Mix
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the diffusion mix amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Diffusion Length
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the diffusion length in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Diffusion Feedback
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the diffusion feedback amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Chorus Enable
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables the Chorus effect.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Reverb Send
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Delay Send
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Stereo Delay effect (0-100%).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Internal Custom Data
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Internal storage for complex settings like step sequences or VGM info.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Effect Preset (Slot 0: Reverb)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Manages presets for the effect in slot 0 (Ambience Reverb).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Effect Preset (Slot 1: Delay)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Manages presets for the effect in slot 1 (Stereo Delay).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Effect Enable (Slot 0: Reverb)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables the effect in slot 0 (Ambience Reverb).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Effect Enable (Slot 1: Delay)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables/disables the effect in slot 1 (Stereo Delay).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: On-Screen Keyboard
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Internal parameter related to the on-screen keyboard display and interaction.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: MTS-ESP Active
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables or disables MIDI Tuning Standard (MTS-ESP) support.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Preset (Main)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Manages preset loading and saving for the main instrument.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Preset (Custom Patch)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Manages presets for the Custom OPLL Patch.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Preset (Arpeggiator)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Manages presets for the Arpeggiator effect.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Preset (Chorus)
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Manages presets for the Chorus effect.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Scala Center Note
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the center note/reference pitch for the loaded Scala tuning file.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: MIDI Input Channel
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the MIDI channel for input (OMNI, 1-16).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Internal Slot Command
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Internal parameter used to trigger commands or actions within the plugin.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Fixed Pitch Root Note
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the root note used when Fixed Pitch is enabled for a channel (C2, C3, C4).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: MIDI Mode
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Selects the MIDI operational mode (Normal, Multi, MPE).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mono Retrigger
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Enables note retriggering in mono mode.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Mono Always Use New Velocity
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Determines if new note velocity is always applied in mono mode, even for legato notes.

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Pitch Bend Range
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the pitch bend range in semitones (Def, OFF, 1-48).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Poly
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Sets the maximum number of simultaneous voices (polyphony, 1-9).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Global Tuning
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts the global tuning offset in cents (-300 to +300).

chipsynth PortaFM.name: Velocity Sensitivity
chipsynth PortaFM.description: Adjusts how note velocity affects amplitude (0.0 to 1.0).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Modulation Wheel
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the modulation amount, typically modulated by a MIDI mod wheel (MIDI CC 1, Range: 0 to 1).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Monophonic
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets Layer A to Monophonic mode.

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Pitch Bend Range
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the pitch bend range in semitones for Layer A (0-12).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Pitch Bend Step
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the pitch bend step size for Layer A (0-12 semitones).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Porta Time
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the portamento time for Layer A (0-99).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Porta Glissando
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables Glissando instead of Portamento for Layer A.

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Porta Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the portamento mode for Layer A (likely Fingered/Full time).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Porta Pedal
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables portamento based on sustain pedal status for Layer A.

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Sustain Pedal
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables sustain pedal (MIDI CC 64) support for Layer A.

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Low Key
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Layer A's key range (0-127).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A High Key
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Layer A's key range (0-127).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Monophonic
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets Layer B to Monophonic mode.

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Pitch Bend Range
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the pitch bend range in semitones for Layer B (0-12).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Pitch Bend Step
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the pitch bend step size for Layer B (0-12 semitones).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Porta Time
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the portamento time for Layer B (0-99).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Porta Glissando
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables Glissando instead of Portamento for Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Porta Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the portamento mode for Layer B (likely Fingered/Full time).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Porta Pedal
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables portamento based on sustain pedal status for Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Sustain Pedal
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables sustain pedal (MIDI CC 64) support for Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Low Key
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Layer B's key range (0-127).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B High Key
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Layer B's key range (0-127).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Pitch Bend
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the pitch bend amount, typically modulated by a MIDI pitch bend wheel (-1 to 1).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Channel Mix Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the channel mixing emulation mode (Fast, Accurate).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Post Filter
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the type of post-DAC audio filter emulation.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Resampler Quality
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the quality level for internal resampling (Default, Better, Best).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A MIDI Channel
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the MIDI input channel for Layer A (Omni, 1-16).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables or disables Layer A.

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Volume
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the volume for Layer A (0-127).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A Pan
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the stereo panning for Layer A (-100=L, 0=C, 100=R).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B MIDI Channel
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the MIDI input channel for Layer B (Omni, 1-16).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables or disables Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Volume
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the volume for Layer B (0-127).

chipsynth OPS7.name: B Pan
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the stereo panning for Layer B (-100=L, 0=C, 100=R).

chipsynth OPS7.name: DAC Companding Error
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the amount of DAC companding error emulation (0-15).

chipsynth OPS7.name: A/B Detune
chipsynth OPS7.description: Applies a detune offset between Layer A and Layer B (0-15).

chipsynth OPS7.name: CC7 Volume Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets how MIDI CC#7 (Volume) is interpreted (None, DX, TX, Smooth).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Parameter Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Switches between Classic (Sysex-compatible) and Extended parameter ranges.

chipsynth OPS7.name: DAC Bits
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the emulated DAC bit depth (2-15 bits, or model-specific).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables or disables Step Sequencer 1.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Target Parameter
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the destination parameter modulated by Step Sequencer 1.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Loop Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the loop mode for Step Sequencer 1 (One Shot, Note Gate, Loop Always).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Sync Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the timing source for Step Sequencer 1 (Host BPM, Internal BPM, Note Period).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Steps
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the number of steps for Step Sequencer 1 (4-64).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Speed Scale
chipsynth OPS7.description: Scales the playback speed of Step Sequencer 1 (0.25x to 8x).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Time Numerator
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the time signature numerator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-32).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Time Denominator
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the time signature denominator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-256).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Loop Start
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the loop start point for Step Sequencer 1 (Internal parameter).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Loop End
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the loop end point for Step Sequencer 1 (Internal parameter).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Start Delay
chipsynth OPS7.description: Delays the start of Step Sequencer 1's playback (0-256 units).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Reset Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets when Step Sequencer 1's position resets (Each Note, First Note, Last Note, Bar Pos, Never).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Step 1 Value Ramp
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the ramp/interpolation time between steps in Step Sequencer 1 (0-1024 units).
