chipsynth OPS7.name: Global Volume
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the main output volume (0.0 to 4.0).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the arpeggiator playback mode (Up, Down, Up-Down, Key, Random).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Type
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the arpeggiator sequence type (Loop, Single, Sustain Last).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Rate
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the arpeggiator speed/note division relative to tempo (1/1 to 1/384).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Gate Length
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the length of notes generated by the arpeggiator (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp BPM
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the internal tempo for the arpeggiator when not synced to host (10-500 BPM).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Range
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the octave range for the arpeggiator (1 oct, 2 oct, 3 oct).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Velocity Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Determines how velocity is applied to arpeggiated notes (Key, 1st, Norm).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Sequence Based
chipsynth OPS7.description: Toggles proportional division for arpeggiator timing.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Sync To Host
chipsynth OPS7.description: Toggles syncing the arpeggiator tempo to the host DAW.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp One Note Repeat
chipsynth OPS7.description: Toggles whether the arpeggiator repeats a single held note.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Swing
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the swing amount for the arpeggiator timing (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Arp Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables or disables the Arpeggiator effect.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus Min Delay
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the minimum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus Max Delay
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the maximum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus Amount
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus Alt Amount
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the alternate modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus Rate
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the LFO rate for the Chorus modulation (0.025Hz to 6Hz).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus LFO Waveform
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the LFO waveform for the Chorus modulation (Sine, Triangle).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus LFO Phase Offset
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the LFO phase offset between channels for the Chorus effect (0-360 degrees).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus Feedback
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Decay
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the decay time of the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Damp Lo Freq
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the frequency for the low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-1000Hz).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Damp Lo Amount
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the amount of low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Damp Hi Freq
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the frequency for the high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (500Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Damp Hi Amount
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the amount of high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Size
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the perceived size of the simulated space in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Width
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the stereo width of the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Predelay
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the predelay time before the reverb onset in the Ambience Reverb (0-500ms).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb EQ Lo Freq
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the frequency for the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-6kHz).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb EQ Lo Gain
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the gain of the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb EQ Hi Freq
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the frequency for the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (250Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb EQ Hi Gain
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the gain of the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Diffusion
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the diffusion amount in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables or disables the Ambience Reverb effect.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Time
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the main delay time (sync factor) for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Beat Delay
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the synced delay time division for the Stereo Delay (0 to 2 bars).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Mod Rate
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the modulation rate for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Mod Level
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the modulation depth/level for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 1 Volume
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the volume of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 2 Volume
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the volume of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 3 Volume
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the volume of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 4 Volume
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the volume of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 1 Pan
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the panning of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 2 Pan
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the panning of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 3 Pan
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the panning of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap 4 Pan
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the panning of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Feedback
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Tap Crossmix
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the crossmix between delay taps in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Diffusion Mix
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the diffusion mix amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Diffusion Length
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the diffusion length in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Diffusion Feedback
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the diffusion feedback amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Chorus Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables or disables the Chorus effect.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Reverb Send
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Delay Send
chipsynth OPS7.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Stereo Delay effect (0-100%).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Internal Custom Data
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal storage for complex settings like modulation matrix, step sequences, or SYSEX info.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Effect Preset (Slot 0: Reverb)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Manages presets for the effect in slot 0 (Ambience Reverb).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Effect Preset (Slot 1: Delay)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Manages presets for the effect in slot 1 (Stereo Delay).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Effect Enable (Slot 0: Reverb)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables/disables the effect in slot 0 (Ambience Reverb).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Effect Enable (Slot 1: Delay)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables/disables the effect in slot 1 (Stereo Delay).

chipsynth OPS7.name: On-Screen Keyboard
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal parameter related to the on-screen keyboard display and interaction.

chipsynth OPS7.name: MTS-ESP Active
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables or disables MIDI Tuning Standard (MTS-ESP) support.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Preset (Main)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Manages preset loading and saving for the main instrument.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Preset (Patch A)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Manages presets for FM Patch A.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Preset (Patch B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Manages presets for FM Patch B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Preset (Arpeggiator)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Manages presets for the Arpeggiator effect.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Preset (Chorus)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Manages presets for the Chorus effect.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Scala Center Note
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the center note/reference pitch for the loaded Scala tuning file.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Internal Slot Command
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal parameter used to trigger commands or actions within the plugin.

chipsynth OPS7.name: MIDI Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the MIDI operational mode (Normal, MPE).

chipsynth OPS7.name: Pitch Bend Range
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets the pitch bend range in semitones (Def, OFF, 1-48).

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables the Hardware Sysex Librarian features.

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Mirror Bank OPS7->HW
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables mirroring of the internal patch bank to connected hardware.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Simulate Note Bugs
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables emulation of certain firmware note handling bugs.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Program Changes Enable
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables responding to MIDI Program Change messages.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Simulate Non-Init State
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables simulation of the synthesizer state before proper initialization.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Velocity Mode
chipsynth OPS7.description: Sets velocity handling mode (External/MIDI or Internal/Fixed).

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Mirror Bank HW->OPS7
chipsynth OPS7.description: Enables mirroring of patch changes from connected hardware to the internal bank.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Firmware Version
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects the emulated firmware version (mk1 old, mk1 v1.8).

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Link Edit Buffer
chipsynth OPS7.description: Links the internal edit buffer to changes made on connected hardware.

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Mirror Layer Select
chipsynth OPS7.description: Selects which internal layer (A, B, None) mirrors the hardware edit buffer.

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Forward Layer->HW
chipsynth OPS7.description: Forwards MIDI events from the selected layer to the connected hardware.

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Forward HW->Layer
chipsynth OPS7.description: Forwards MIDI events received from the connected hardware to the selected layer.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Global Tuning
chipsynth OPS7.description: Adjusts the global tuning offset in cents (-300 to +300).

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Bank Get
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to request the bank dump from hardware.

chipsynth OPS7.name: HW Librarian Bank Push
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to send the internal bank to hardware.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP4
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 4 settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP3
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 3 settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP2
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 2 settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP1
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 1 settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP6 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 6 settings from Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP5 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 5 settings from Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP4 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 4 settings from Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP3 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 3 settings from Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP2 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 2 settings from Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP1 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 1 settings from Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Save Patch A
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to save the current Patch A settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP6
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 6.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP5
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 5.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP4
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 4.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP3
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 3.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP2
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 2.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP1
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 1.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP6 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 6 on Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP5 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 5 on Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP4 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 4 on Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP3 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 3 on Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Save Patch B
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to save the current Patch B settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP2 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 2 on Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Paste OP1 (Layer B)
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to paste copied settings to Operator 1 on Layer B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy Patch B to A
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Patch B settings to Patch A.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy Patch A to B
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Patch A settings to Patch B.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Randomize Patch A
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to randomize Patch A settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Randomize Patch B
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to randomize Patch B settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP6
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 6 settings.

chipsynth OPS7.name: Copy OP5
chipsynth OPS7.description: Internal command parameter to copy Operator 5 settings.

chipsynth C64.name: Modulation Wheel
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the modulation amount, typically modulated by a MIDI mod wheel (MIDI CC 1, Range: 0 to 1).

chipsynth C64.name: Pitch Bend
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the pitch bend amount, typically modulated by a MIDI pitch bend wheel (-1 to 1).

chipsynth C64.name: Clock Config
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulated SID clock speed (PAL C64, NTSC C64, etc.).

chipsynth C64.name: Audio Out Type
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the C64 audio output emulation type (A/V Jack, RF Mod C64, RF Mod C64C).

chipsynth C64.name: Resampler Quality
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the quality level for internal resampling (Default, Better, Best).

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Player Play
chipsynth C64.description: Starts or resumes playback of the file.

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Player Stop
chipsynth C64.description: Stops playback of the file.

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Player Speed Multiplier
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the playback speed multiplier for VGM/SID files (0.1x to 2x).

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Player Prev Track
chipsynth C64.description: Goes to the previous track/subtune in a multi-part file.

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Player Next Track
chipsynth C64.description: Goes to the next track/subtune in a multi-part file.

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Player Rewind
chipsynth C64.description: Rewinds the currently playing file.

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Display Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the information displayed in the visualizer area (Song Info, Registers).

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Target Play Length (Frames)
chipsynth C64.description: Sets a target playback length in frames for VGM files (requires 'Limit Play Time' enabled).

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Limit Play Time
chipsynth C64.description: Enables limiting VGM playback time to the value set in 'Target Play Length'.

chipsynth C64.name: VGM Player Type
chipsynth C64.description: Indicates if the loaded file is a PSID file (Internal).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables Oscillator 1.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Low Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Oscillator 1's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 High Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Oscillator 1's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Note Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Applies a delay to note playback on Oscillator 1 (0-100 units).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Coarse Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the coarse tuning of Oscillator 1 (-128 to +127 semitones).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Fine Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the fine tuning of Oscillator 1 (-100 to +100 cents).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Fixed Pitch
chipsynth C64.description: Enables fixed pitch playback for Oscillator 1 (ignores note input pitch).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Glide
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the portamento/glide time for Oscillator 1 (0-100).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables Oscillator 2.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Low Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Oscillator 2's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 High Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Oscillator 2's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Note Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Applies a delay to note playback on Oscillator 2 (0-100 units).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Coarse Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the coarse tuning of Oscillator 2 (-128 to +127 semitones).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Fine Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the fine tuning of Oscillator 2 (-100 to +100 cents).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Fixed Pitch
chipsynth C64.description: Enables fixed pitch playback for Oscillator 2 (ignores note input pitch).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Glide
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the portamento/glide time for Oscillator 2 (0-100).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables Oscillator 3.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Low Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for Oscillator 3's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 High Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for Oscillator 3's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Note Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Applies a delay to note playback on Oscillator 3 (0-100 units).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Coarse Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the coarse tuning of Oscillator 3 (-128 to +127 semitones).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Fine Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the fine tuning of Oscillator 3 (-100 to +100 cents).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Fixed Pitch
chipsynth C64.description: Enables fixed pitch playback for Oscillator 3 (ignores note input pitch).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Glide
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the portamento/glide time for Oscillator 3 (0-100).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables the DAC/Sample Playback channel.

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Low Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the lowest MIDI key for the DAC channel's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC High Key
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the highest MIDI key for the DAC channel's key range (0-127).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Note Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Applies a delay to note playback on the DAC channel (0-100 units).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Coarse Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the coarse tuning of the DAC channel (-128 to +127 semitones).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Fine Tune
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the fine tuning of the DAC channel (-100 to +100 cents).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Fixed Pitch
chipsynth C64.description: Enables fixed pitch playback for the DAC channel (ignores note input pitch).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Glide
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the portamento/glide time for the DAC channel (0-100).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 PW Lo
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the low byte of Oscillator 1's Pulse Width (0-255).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 PW Hi
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the high byte of Oscillator 1's Pulse Width (0-15).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Wave Control
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the waveform bits (Noise, Pulse, Saw, Tri) for Oscillator 1.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Attack/Decay
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the Attack (bits 4-7) and Decay (bits 0-3) rates for Oscillator 1 (0-15 each).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Sustain/Release
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the Sustain level (bits 4-7) and Release rate (bits 0-3) for Oscillator 1 (0-15 each).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Sync/Ring Control
chipsynth C64.description: Controls Hard Sync (bit 1) and Ring Modulation (bit 2) for Oscillator 1.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Gate/Stall Control
chipsynth C64.description: Controls Gate (bit 0) and Test/Stall bit (bit 3) for Oscillator 1.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc1 Filter Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables routing Oscillator 1's output to the filter.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 PW Lo
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the low byte of Oscillator 2's Pulse Width (0-255).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 PW Hi
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the high byte of Oscillator 2's Pulse Width (0-15).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Wave Control
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the waveform bits (Noise, Pulse, Saw, Tri) for Oscillator 2.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Attack/Decay
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the Attack (bits 4-7) and Decay (bits 0-3) rates for Oscillator 2 (0-15 each).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Sustain/Release
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the Sustain level (bits 4-7) and Release rate (bits 0-3) for Oscillator 2 (0-15 each).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Sync/Ring Control
chipsynth C64.description: Controls Hard Sync (bit 1, syncs to Osc 1) and Ring Modulation (bit 2, modulates with Osc 1) for Oscillator 2.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Gate/Stall Control
chipsynth C64.description: Controls Gate (bit 0) and Test/Stall bit (bit 3) for Oscillator 2.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc2 Filter Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables routing Oscillator 2's output to the filter.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 PW Lo
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the low byte of Oscillator 3's Pulse Width (0-255).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 PW Hi
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the high byte of Oscillator 3's Pulse Width (0-15).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Wave Control
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the waveform bits (Noise, Pulse, Saw, Tri) for Oscillator 3.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Attack/Decay
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the Attack (bits 4-7) and Decay (bits 0-3) rates for Oscillator 3 (0-15 each).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Sustain/Release
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the Sustain level (bits 4-7) and Release rate (bits 0-3) for Oscillator 3 (0-15 each).

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Sync/Ring Control
chipsynth C64.description: Controls Hard Sync (bit 1, syncs to Osc 2) and Ring Modulation (bit 2, modulates with Osc 2) for Oscillator 3.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Gate/Stall Control
chipsynth C64.description: Controls Gate (bit 0) and Test/Stall bit (bit 3) for Oscillator 3.

chipsynth C64.name: Osc3 Filter Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables routing Oscillator 3's output to the filter.

chipsynth C64.name: Filter Osc3 Off
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 3's contribution to the audio output (Filter control register bit 7).

chipsynth C64.name: Filter Cutoff Lo
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the low 3 bits of the Filter Cutoff Frequency (0-7).

chipsynth C64.name: Filter Cutoff Hi
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the high 8 bits of the Filter Cutoff Frequency (0-255).

chipsynth C64.name: Filter Resonance/Route Control
chipsynth C64.description: Sets Filter Resonance (bits 4-7) and Oscillator filter routing enables (bits 0-3).

chipsynth C64.name: Filter Mode/Volume Control
chipsynth C64.description: Sets Filter Mode (LP bit 4, BP bit 5, HP bit 6) and Master Volume (bits 0-3).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU Input MIDI Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the MIDI input mode for SID file playback/emulation (None, Piano Overlay, Bidule HID, Semi ASCII).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the DAC emulation mode (Vol Reg, 1-bit, Mahoney, THCM).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC 1-bit Destination
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the destination parameter for the 1-bit DAC output (PW Osc1/2/3, Filter Osc1/2/3, LPF/BPF/HPF On).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Bias
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the DC bias of the DAC output (-1.0 to +1.0).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain applied to the DAC sample (0x to 4x).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Slicer Playback Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Sets how slices/regions of the DAC sample are played back (Region, Continue, Loop, Full Wave).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC Slicer MIDI Offset
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the base MIDI note for triggering DAC sample slices (C-2 to C2).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables the master compressor effect.

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Threshold
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the threshold for the compressor (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Ratio
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the compression ratio (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Volume
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the make-up gain for the compressor (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Attack
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the attack time for the compressor (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Release
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the release time for the compressor (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor RMS Time
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the RMS window time for the compressor detector (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Parallel Mix
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the parallel mix (dry/wet) for the compressor (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Multiband
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the multiband processing amount/crossover for the compressor (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: Compressor Band Balance
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the balance between bands in the multiband compressor (0-1).

chipsynth C64.name: DAC THCM Channel
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the target SID channel for THCM DAC emulation (Osc1, Osc2, Osc3).

chipsynth C64.name: SID1 Model
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulated SID chip model for SID 1 (various 6581/8580 revisions).

chipsynth C64.name: SID1 Filter Juice
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the 'juice' or non-linearity characteristic of the SID 1 filter emulation (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: SID1 Cutoff Offset
chipsynth C64.description: Applies a global offset to the SID 1 filter cutoff frequency (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: SID1 Filter Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain of the SID 1 filter emulation (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: SID1 Digi Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain applied specifically to the digital (DAC) portion of the SID 1 emulation (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: ADSR Behavior
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the ADSR envelope generator behavior emulation (Exponential/Linear Decay, Fast Attack 0, Hardware Bugs).

chipsynth C64.name: Waveform Combiner Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the algorithm used for combining waveforms when multiple are active on an oscillator (Normal, AND, MIX, etc.).

chipsynth C64.name: Filter Pops
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulation accuracy for filter switching pops/clicks (Full Emu, Mods Only).

chipsynth C64.name: Oscillator Leak
chipsynth C64.description: Enables/disables emulation of oscillator signal leakage (Off, On).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Model
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulated SID chip model for SID 1 in the EMU tab (various 6581/8580 revisions).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Filter Juice
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the 'juice' or non-linearity characteristic of the SID 1 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Cutoff Offset
chipsynth C64.description: Applies a global offset to the SID 1 filter cutoff frequency in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Filter Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain of the SID 1 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Digi Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain applied specifically to the digital (DAC) portion of the SID 1 emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Osc1 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 1 for SID 1 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Osc2 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 2 for SID 1 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID1 Osc3 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 3 for SID 1 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Model
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulated SID chip model for SID 2 in the EMU tab (various 6581/8580 revisions).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Filter Juice
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the 'juice' or non-linearity characteristic of the SID 2 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Cutoff Offset

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Filter Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain of the SID 2 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Digi Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain applied specifically to the digital (DAC) portion of the SID 2 emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Osc1 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 1 for SID 2 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Osc2 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 2 for SID 2 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID2 Osc3 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 3 for SID 2 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID3 Model
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulated SID chip model for SID 3 in the EMU tab (various 6581/8580 revisions).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID3 Filter Juice
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the 'juice' or non-linearity characteristic of the SID 3 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID3 Filter Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain of the SID 3 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID3 Digi Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain applied specifically to the digital (DAC) portion of the SID 3 emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 1 for SID 3 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID3 Osc2 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 2 for SID 3 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID3 Osc3 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 3 for SID 3 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID4 Model
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulated SID chip model for SID 4 in the EMU tab (various 6581/8580 revisions).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID4 Filter Juice
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the 'juice' or non-linearity characteristic of the SID 4 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID4 Cutoff Offset
chipsynth C64.description: Applies a global offset to the SID 4 filter cutoff frequency in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID4 Filter Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain of the SID 4 filter emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID4 Digi Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the gain applied specifically to the digital (DAC) portion of the SID 4 emulation in the EMU tab (-1 to +1).

chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 1 for SID 4 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID4 Osc2 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 2 for SID 4 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: EMU SID4 Osc3 Mute
chipsynth C64.description: Mutes Oscillator 3 for SID 4 in the EMU tab.

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables Step Sequencer 1.

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Target Parameter
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the destination parameter modulated by Step Sequencer 1.

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Loop Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the loop mode for Step Sequencer 1 (One Shot, Note Gate, Loop Always).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Sync Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the timing source for Step Sequencer 1 (Host BPM, Internal BPM, Note Period).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Steps
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the number of steps for Step Sequencer 1 (4-128).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Speed Scale
chipsynth C64.description: Scales the playback speed of Step Sequencer 1 (0.25x to 8x).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Time Numerator
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the time signature numerator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-32).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Time Denominator
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the time signature denominator for Step Sequencer 1's timing (1-256).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Loop Start
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the loop start point for Step Sequencer 1 (Internal parameter).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Loop End
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the loop end point for Step Sequencer 1 (Internal parameter).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Start Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Delays the start of Step Sequencer 1's playback (0-256 units).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Reset Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Sets when Step Sequencer 1's position resets (Each Note, First Note, Last Note, Bar Pos, Never).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Value Ramp
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the ramp/interpolation time between steps in Step Sequencer 1 (0-1024 units).

chipsynth C64.name: Step 1 Swing
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the swing amount for Step Sequencer 1 timing (0-25).

chipsynth C64.description: Selects the arpeggiator playback mode (Up, Down, Up-Down, Key, Random).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Type
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the arpeggiator sequence type (Loop, Single, Sustain Last).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Rate
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the arpeggiator speed/note division relative to tempo (1/1 to 1/384).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Gate Length
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the length of notes generated by the arpeggiator (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp BPM
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the internal tempo for the arpeggiator when not synced to host (10-500 BPM).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Range
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the octave range for the arpeggiator (1 oct, 2 oct, 3 oct).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Velocity Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Determines how velocity is applied to arpeggiated notes (Key, 1st, Norm).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Sequence Based
chipsynth C64.description: Toggles proportional division for arpeggiator timing.

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Sync To Host
chipsynth C64.description: Toggles syncing the arpeggiator tempo to the host DAW.

chipsynth C64.name: Arp One Note Repeat
chipsynth C64.description: Toggles whether the arpeggiator repeats a single held note.

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Swing
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the swing amount for the arpeggiator timing (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Arp Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables the Arpeggiator effect.

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus Min Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the minimum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus Max Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the maximum delay time for the Chorus effect (0-50ms).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus Amount
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus Alt Amount
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the alternate modulation depth/amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus Rate
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the LFO rate for the Chorus modulation (0.025Hz to 6Hz).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus LFO Waveform
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the LFO waveform for the Chorus modulation (Sine, Triangle).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus LFO Phase Offset
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the LFO phase offset between channels for the Chorus effect (0-360 degrees).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus Feedback
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Chorus effect (-100% to +100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Decay
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the decay time of the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Damp Lo Freq
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the frequency for the low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-1000Hz).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Damp Lo Amount
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the amount of low frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Damp Hi Freq
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the frequency for the high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (500Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Damp Hi Amount
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the amount of high frequency damping in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Size
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the perceived size of the simulated space in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Width
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the stereo width of the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Predelay
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the predelay time before the reverb onset in the Ambience Reverb (0-500ms).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb EQ Lo Freq
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the frequency for the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (25Hz-6kHz).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb EQ Lo Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the gain of the low shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb EQ Hi Freq
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the frequency for the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (250Hz-22kHz).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb EQ Hi Gain
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the gain of the high shelf EQ in the Ambience Reverb (0-200%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Diffusion
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the diffusion amount in the Ambience Reverb (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables the Ambience Reverb effect.

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Time
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the main delay time (sync factor) for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Beat Delay
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the synced delay time division for the Stereo Delay (0 to 2 bars).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Mod Rate
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the modulation rate for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Mod Level
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the modulation depth/level for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 1 Volume
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the volume of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 2 Volume
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the volume of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 3 Volume
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the volume of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 4 Volume
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the volume of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 1 Pan
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the panning of Tap 1 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 2 Pan
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the panning of Tap 2 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 3 Pan
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the panning of Tap 3 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap 4 Pan
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the panning of Tap 4 in the Stereo Delay (L-R).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Feedback
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the feedback amount for the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Tap Crossmix
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the crossmix between delay taps in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Diffusion Mix
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the diffusion mix amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Diffusion Length
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the diffusion length in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Diffusion Feedback
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the diffusion feedback amount in the Stereo Delay (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Chorus Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables the Chorus effect.

chipsynth C64.name: Reverb Send
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Ambience Reverb effect (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Delay Send
chipsynth C64.description: Controls the amount of signal sent to the Stereo Delay effect (0-100%).

chipsynth C64.name: Effect Preset (Slot 1: Delay)

chipsynth C64.name: Effect Enable (Slot 1: Delay)

chipsynth C64.description: Enables or disables MIDI Tuning Standard (MTS-ESP) support.

chipsynth C64.name: Preset (Patch B)

chipsynth C64.name: Preset (Arpeggiator)

chipsynth C64.name: Preset (Chorus)

chipsynth C64.name: Internal Slot Command
chipsynth C64.description: Internal parameter used to trigger commands or actions within the plugin.

chipsynth C64.name: MIDI Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the MIDI operational mode (Normal, MPE).

chipsynth C64.name: Pitch Bend Range
chipsynth C64.description: Sets the pitch bend range in semitones (Def, OFF, 1-48).

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables the Hardware Sysex Librarian features.

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Mirror Bank OPS7->HW
chipsynth C64.description: Enables mirroring of the internal patch bank to connected hardware.

chipsynth C64.name: Simulate Note Bugs
chipsynth C64.description: Enables emulation of certain firmware note handling bugs.

chipsynth C64.name: Program Changes Enable
chipsynth C64.description: Enables responding to MIDI Program Change messages.

chipsynth C64.name: Simulate Non-Init State
chipsynth C64.description: Enables simulation of the synthesizer state before proper initialization.

chipsynth C64.name: Velocity Mode
chipsynth C64.description: Sets velocity handling mode (External/MIDI or Internal/Fixed).

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Mirror Bank HW->OPS7
chipsynth C64.description: Enables mirroring of patch changes from connected hardware to the internal bank.

chipsynth C64.name: Firmware Version
chipsynth C64.description: Selects the emulated firmware version (mk1 old, mk1 v1.8).

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Link Edit Buffer
chipsynth C64.description: Links the internal edit buffer to changes made on connected hardware.

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Mirror Layer Select
chipsynth C64.description: Selects which internal layer (A, B, None) mirrors the hardware edit buffer.

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Forward Layer->HW
chipsynth C64.description: Forwards MIDI events from the selected layer to the connected hardware.

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Forward HW->Layer
chipsynth C64.description: Forwards MIDI events received from the connected hardware to the selected layer.

chipsynth C64.name: Global Tuning
chipsynth C64.description: Adjusts the global tuning offset in cents (-300 to +300).

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Bank Get
chipsynth C64.description: Internal command parameter to request the bank dump from hardware.

chipsynth C64.name: HW Librarian Bank Push
chipsynth C64.description: Internal command parameter to send the internal bank to hardware.
